mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT m.perm_code FROM un_plat_account_role ar INNER JOIN un_plat_role r ON ar.role_id = r.id AND r.status = 1 INNER JOIN un_plat_role_menu rm ON r.id = rm.role_id INNER JOIN un_plat_menu m ON rm.menu_id = m.id AND m.status = 1 WHERE ar.plat_account_id = #{platId} AND m.perm_code IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(m.perm_code) <> ''

SELECT DISTINCT m.id, m.parent_id, m.menu_name, m.menu_type, m.path, m.perm_code, m.icon, m.sort_no, m.visible_flag, m.status, m.remark, m.create_user_id, m.update_user_id, m.create_time, m.update_time FROM un_plat_account_role ar INNER JOIN un_plat_role r ON ar.role_id = r.id AND r.status = 1 INNER JOIN un_plat_role_menu rm ON r.id = rm.role_id INNER JOIN un_plat_menu m ON rm.menu_id = m.id AND m.status = 1 WHERE ar.plat_account_id = #{platId} ORDER BY m.parent_id ASC, m.sort_no ASC, m.id ASC
SELECT DISTINCT r.role_code FROM un_plat_account_role ar INNER JOIN un_plat_role r ON ar.role_id = r.id AND r.status = 1 WHERE ar.plat_account_id = #{platId} ORDER BY r.role_code ASC
